titlestmt.titleproper: World War II servicemen alumni files41-2-822
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Eileen Keating

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: World War II servicemen alumni files
did.abstract: Correspondence, photographs, clippings, and biographical data concerning Cornell University alumni who died during World War II.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, photographs, clippings, and biographical data concerning Cornell University alumni who died during World War II.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: For all other alumni, see Cornell deceased alumni files, #41-2-877.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: World War II servicemen alumni files, #41-2-822. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Bakewell, Chief Warrant Officer Joseph Hunter
Brokenshire, Lt. Comdr. Herbert Cecil Grad.
2nd Lt. Howard W. Eggert SP. AGR

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains the volume Life of John West Jackson by Isabel Morrison West Jackson.

did.unittitle: Kearns, 2nd Lt. Charles MI Chael, Jr. AUS
Ma Kirdy, Col. Howard Spencer Med.
Morgan, Sgt. George Alexander Sp. Agr.
